Name: Label
Description: A display label for the Methodology.

Name: DataCollectionMethodology
Description: Methodologies pertaining to the overall data collection such as primary or secondary data collection, qualitative or quantitative methods, mixed method approaches, GPS capturing methods, methods for collecting data from hard to reach communities, etc. Repeat this element if multiple methodologies are used. Repeat this element if multiple methodologies are used.

Name: TimeMethod
Description: Describes how time fits into the data collection methodology.

Name: WeightingMethodologyReference
Description: A basic structure for describing the methodology used for weighting. In addition to a descriptive narrative, the methodology may be classified by a short term or external controlled vocabulary.

Name: SamplingProcedure
Description: Describes a sampling procedure. If multiple sampling procedures were used repeat this element for each.

Name: DeviationFromSampleDesign
Description: Describes any deviations from the planned sample design.

Name: DataCollectionSoftware
Description: Specification of a software package used to instantiate a data collection method.

Name: QualityStatementReference
Description: A reference to a Quality Statement pertaining to the quality of the study methodology, metadata, or data to which it is associated. Quality statements may be related to external quality standards.
